title: evansia nantouensis
intro: Evansia nantouensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the Taiwanese spurge. The medicinal properties of Evansia nantouensis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of using Evansia nantouensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Evansia nantouensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in Taiwan to treat various ailments.
